creator: rodrigc@FreeBSD.org
text:
If someone submits a ports PR, and gives
a FreeBSD.org e-mail address, the PR automatically
gets assigned to the PR submitter.

Ideally, this should be modified so that it only
happens under the following circumstancse:

(1)  The submitter is listed as the MAINTAINER of the port
     listed in the PR.

(2)  The submitter has a ports commit bit.
